generated_oml:
instance GantryCranePositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors measuring position of gantry crane components"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GantryCranePositionDataTransmitted
]

instance GantryCraneVelocitySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors measuring velocity of gantry crane components"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GantryCraneVelocityDataTransmitted
]

instance GantryCraneLoadSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors measuring load on gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GantryCraneLoadDataTransmitted
]

instance GantryCranePositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GantryCranePositionSensor
]

instance GantryCraneVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GantryCraneVelocitySensor
]

instance GantryCraneLoadDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GantryCraneLoadSensor
]

instance GantryCranePositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data of gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GantryCranePositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBLoggingEnabler
]

instance GantryCraneVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Velocity data of gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GantryCraneVelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBLoggingEnabler
]

instance GantryCraneLoadData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Load data of gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GantryCraneLoadDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBLoggingEnabler
]

instance TimescaleDBLoggingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for logging data to TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance C4ModelEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for visualizing software architecture using C4 Model"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance GitHubVersionControl : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "GitHub for version control of digital twin models"
    DTDFVocab:enables SystemEvolutionSupportService
]

instance ContainerizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization technologies for deployment"
    DTDFVocab:enables SystemEvolutionSupportService
]

instance C4Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "C4 Model for software architecture visualization via context and container diagrams"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo C4ModelEnabler
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimal control for system optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalControlInsight
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Historical data logging for operational data recording"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data visualization for real-time and historical data representation"
    DTDFVocab:provides RuntimeVisualizationInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous validation to ensure synchronization between physical and digital models"
    DTDFVocab:provides ContinuousValidationInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection for anomaly identification"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight
]

instance SystemEvolutionSupportService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "System evolution support via DarTwin notation"
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemEvolutionInsight
]

instance RuntimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Runtime visualization for indoor air quality management"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation applications for indoor air quality management"
]

instance PredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Prediction applications for indoor air quality management"
]

instance OptimalControlInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal control for system optimization"
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical data logging for operational data recording"
]

instance ContinuousValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Continuous validation to ensure synchronization between physical and digital models"
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Fault detection for anomaly identification"
]

instance SystemEvolutionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "System evolution support via DarTwin notation"
]

instance GantryCranePhysicalSystem : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical crane structure of lab-scale gantry crane"
]

instance GantryCraneController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Controller of lab-scale gantry crane"
]

instance PhysicalCraneInterface : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Python program that collects data from Physical Crane"
]

instance LabEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains GantryCranePhysicalSystem, GantryCraneController, PhysicalCraneInterface
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands from the Control Application are transmitted via the Physical Crane Interface to the physical crane hardware for execution."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system architecture is described using the C4 Model with context and container diagrams, incorporating containerization for resource management and deployment, and adopting an ad-hoc approach without a commercial digital twin framework."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol is used for inter-service communication via an MQTT Broker; TimescaleDB handles time-series data storage."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Air Quality Management exemplar uses AutomationML for digital twin modeling [14], and the Lab Scale Gantry Crane applies the C4 Model for software architecture description [5]."
]
